claims.name: I_band_positive_endpoint_thinnest
claims.detail: (joint>1 across I in [4e-4,2e-3] and the endpoint I=2e-3 is the thinnest: {'4e-04': 1.126, '1e-03': 1.104, '2e-03': 1.04}; the certified band is positively closed, binding at the endpoint)

claims.name: mu2_band_sign_stable
claims.detail: (joint>1 across mu^2 in [x0.5,x2] at the endpoint; worst x1.034 -- sign-stable, consistent with ROBUSTNESS-MU2)

claims.name: structural_sunset_saturation
claims.detail: (joint(rho) saturates at x1.130 (=1/(1/1.13)) as rho->inf: the SUNSET caps the joint -- the thinness is a genuine near-critical balance, not a numerical artefact; no floor sharpening can exceed x1.13)

claims.name: endpoint_below_critical_I
claims.detail: (the critical I (joint=1) is ~2.5e-3 > the certified endpoint 2e-3: joint(2.5e-3)=x1.000; the endpoint sits inside the closed region, near the structural boundary)
